hooks.command:
node --input-type=module --eval "import{createInterface}from'readline';const rl=createInterface({input:process.stdin});let d='';rl.on('line',l=>{d+=l});rl.on('close',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=(i.command||'').trim();if(/^(npm |yarn |npx )/.test(cmd)){console.error('⚠️  GUARDRAIL [pnpm-only]: Command uses npm/yarn/npx.
This project uses pnpm exclusively.
Replace with: pnpm / pnpm dlx
');process.exit(2);}process.exit(0);}catch{process.exit(0);}});"

node --input-type=module --eval "import{createInterface}from'readline';const rl=createInterface({input:process.stdin});let d='';rl.on('line',l=>{d+=l});rl.on('close',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const fp=i.file_path||i.path||'';const genFiles=['src/data/navigationData.ts','src/utils/indexContentMap.ts'];if(genFiles.some(f=>fp.endsWith(f.replace(///g,require('path').sep)))||genFiles.some(f=>fp.includes(f))){process.stderr.write('⚠️  GUARDRAIL [generated-file]: '+fp+'
is AUTO-GENERATED by pnpm sync-toc — do NOT hand-edit.
To update navigation, edit: src/pages/content/6_1/index.md
Then run: pnpm sync-toc
');}process.exit(0);}catch{process.exit(0);}});"

node --input-type=module --eval "import{createInterface}from'readline';const rl=createInterface({input:process.stdin});let d='';rl.on('line',l=>{d+=l});rl.on('close',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const content=JSON.stringify(i);if(//v6_1//.test(content)||/\\v6_1\\/.test(content)){process.stderr.write('⚠️  GUARDRAIL [legacy-path]: Content references /v6_1/ path.
The CORRECT path is /6_1/ (no v-prefix).
See CLAUDE.md » Naming Conventions for the path contract.
');}process.exit(0);}catch{process.exit(0);}});"

node --input-type=module --eval "process.stderr.write('
\u{1F9E0}  SESSION END REMINDER
---
If you modified code files, CI files, or architecture docs, consider:
  pnpm memory:check    — detect repo-memory drift
  pnpm validate        — full validation gate
  pnpm build           — verify no build regressions
---
');process.exit(0);"
